creator: parakleta@darkreality.org
text:
(In reply to Duncan Paterson from comment #3)

Based on the commit you shared, it looks like it should be easily fixable just by updating the `TERMPATH` define around line 64 of the `ncurses_cfg.h` file, in https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/tree/lib/ncurses/ncurses/ncurses_cfg.h?id=61f66a1f4403fded9aae14d890ad96914a3c0bc1
